1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get fylke table for mapping municipality to county

3.description: attach county to the Trondheim municipality by spatial join of kommune and fylke

5.description: get quick-clay release areas (utlosningomr) with class attribute

6.description: reduce quick-clay areas to Trondheim extent by spatial join

7.description: keep only high risk quick-clay polygons (use identifier from step 4)

8.description: get parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2

9.description: find parcels intersecting high-risk quick-clay polygons

10.description: deduplicate parcels, then sort by area desc and limit to 10 in subsequent steps if needed

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE fylkesnavn ILIKE '%Trøndelag%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT identifier FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier::int DESC LIMIT 1;
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 6 is planned as 'spatial_join', not a SQL query. Do not validate SQL for this step.", "step": 6, "action": "spatial_join"}

2.sql: SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke WHERE fylkesnavn ILIKE '%Trøndelag%';

5.sql: SELECT identifier FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse ORDER BY identifier::int DESC LIMIT 1;

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get county geometries (Trøndelag) to map municipality to county

3.description: map municipality to county by intersection (attach fylke attributes to municipality)

4.description: get quick-clay release areas (utlosningomr) filtered to the highest risk class using a subquery on the risk-class table and return geometry and class

5.description: select parcels (teig) in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2 and return key attributes and geometry

6.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay release areas

7.description: collapse to one row per parcel (group by parcel id and keep area, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst) and count matching quick-clay polygons

8.description: attach municipality and county names to parcels via kommunenummer using the municipality-county mapping from step 3

9.description: sort parcels by parcel area descending

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [fylker]
SELECT objid, fylkesnummer, fylkesnavn, omrade
FROM fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE fylkesnavn ILIKE '%Trøndelag%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT identifier, description FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.skredrisikokvikkleireklasse;
